MODULE: cosmos.integration.chain_memory.auto_save
FILE: cosmos/integration/chain_memory/auto_save.py (383 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: Chain Memory Auto-Save

Automatically backs up Cosmos state to Monad blockchain.

Features:
- Periodic backups (configurable interval)
- Pre-crash detection backup
- Balance checking before upload
- COSMOS verification before each save

CLASSES:
- AutoSaveManager: Manages automatic state backups to chain.

Runs in background, periodically capt
  Methods: def verify_requirements(self) -> dict
  Methods: async def save_state_now(self, title: Optional[str]=None) -> dict
  Methods: def start(self)
  Methods: def stop(self)
  Methods: def get_status(self) -> dict

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def register_crash_handler(manager: AutoSaveManager)
- def enable_auto_save(interval_minutes: int=60, crash_save: bool=True) -> AutoSaveManager
- def disable_auto_save()
